source.original_excerpt: Semyon Williams Jr., also known as SJ, was at the neighborhood pool in Old Orchard Park in Frisco last Thursday when he dove into the shallow end while trying to run from a wasp...   some f: Facility, shallow: ShallowZone, dive: DivingArea, teen: Patron, guard: Lifeguard, cr: ChemicalReadings, pr: PumpRoom {
    // Exactly one facility
    all f2: Facility | f2 = f
    // Only one patron, one lifeguard
    all p2: Patron | p2 = teen
    all lg2: Lifeguard | lg2 = guard
    // Only one shallow zone and one diving area
    all sh2: ShallowZone | sh2 = shallow
    all da2: DivingArea | da2 = dive
    // Exactly one chemical reading and pump room
    all cr2: ChemicalReadings | cr2 = cr
    all pr2: PumpRoom | pr2 = pr

    // Prevent extraneous atoms that could violate facts
    no HeadLifeguard
    no FacilityManager
    no Adult
    no BiohazardIncident
    no MedicalClearance
    no SupplementaryWaiver
    no DeepZone
    no WavePool
    no LazyRiver
    no WaterSlide
    no Spa

    // The two zones belong to the facility
    shallow in f.zones
    dive in f.zones
    f.zones = shallow + dive

    // Shallow zone properties
    shallow.depthInches = 36
    shallow.isDeepEnd = False
    shallow.hasDivingBoard = False
    shallow.patronCount = 0
    shallow.assignedGuard = guard
    shallow.fullyVisualized = True

    // Diving area properties (where head-first dives are permitted)
    dive.depthInches = 120
    dive.isDeepEnd = True
    dive.hasDivingBoard = True
    dive.patronCount = 0
    dive.assignedGuard = none
    dive.fullyVisualized = True
    dive.personsOnApparatus = 0
    dive.previousDiverSurfaced = True
    dive.previousDiverReachedWall = True

    // Teenager patron (age 15) attempting a head-first dive in the shallow zone
    teen.age = 15
    teen.heightInches = 60
    teen.armpitHeightInches = 48
    teen.chestHeightInches = 50
    teen.weightLbsTen = 12
    teen.wristband = Green
    teen.chaperoneAdult = none
    teen.inWaterBuddy = none
    teen.medicalClearance = none
    teen.supplementaryWaiver = none
    teen.highRiskCertifications = none
    teen.hasGIIllnessWithin14Days = False
    teen.hasOpenWounds = False
    teen.tookShowerWithSoap = False
    teen.wearsSwimDiaper = False
    teen.wearsUSCGLifeJacket = False
    teen.carriesContraband = False
    teen.hasHighRiskMedicalCondition = False
    teen.participatesInHighRiskActivity = False
    teen.isRegisteredAthlete = False
    teen.currentBehaviors = DivingInShallowWater
    teen.inWater = none
    teen.onDeck = True
    teen.drowningStage = none
    teen.strikes = 1
    teen.inTimeOut = False
    teen.timeOutMinutesRemaining = 0
    teen.permanentBan = False

    // Lifeguard on duty, qualified, fit, and intervening
    guard.onDuty = True
    guard.certifications = LifeguardCert + CPR_AED_Cert + FirstAidCert
    guard.consumedAlcoholWithinTwelveHrs = False
    guard.onDrowsyMedication = False
    guard.physicallyMentallyReady = True
    guard.passedLastAudit = True
    guard.auditResponseSeconds = 5
    guard.assignedZone = shallow
    guard.eyesOnWater = True
    guard.hasRescueTube = True
    guard.inEAPResponse = False
    guard.visualScanWithinTenSec = True
    guard.canReachZoneInTwentySec = True
    guard.zoneFullyVisualized = True
    guard.minutesSinceRotation = 5
    guard.inServiceTrainingHoursMonth = 4
    guard.relievedBy = none

    // Facility capacity, ops, weather, emergencies all in safe inactive states
    f.maxBatherLoad = 100
    f.currentBatherCount = 0
    f.fireCapacity = 200
    f.shallowAreaRatioCompliant = True
    f.deepAreaRatioCompliant = True
    f.turnstileLocked = False
    f.powerOn = True
    f.fireAlarmActive = False
    f.mainDrainVisible = True
    f.airQualitySafe = True
    f.hvacFreshAirMode = False
    f.evacuatedDueToAir = False
    f.chloramineOdorExceedsLimit = False
    f.exitsLocked = False
    f.mylarBlanketsDistributed = False
    f.lockerRoomBypassEnforced = False
    f.lightningDetected = False
    f.lastThunderMinutesAgo = 60
    f.windSpeed = 10
    f.showersInUse = False
    f.outdoorElevatedStructuresOpen = True
    f.outdoorFullyEvacuated = False
    f.sunGlareAffectingZones = False
    f.codeAdamActive = False
    f.missingChildAge = 0
    f.codeAdamMinutesElapsed = 0
    f.lawEnforcementContacted = False
    f.fireEvacuationActive = False
    f.superChlorinationInProgress = False
    f.lastManualTestMinutesAgo = 60
    f.sanctionedPracticeActive = False
    f.activeBiohazardIncident = none

    // Chemical readings within safe bounds
    cr.facTenthPPM = 30
    cr.combinedChlorineTenthPPM = 2
    cr.orpHundredMV = 8
    cr.pHTenth = 75
    cr.totalAlkalinity = 100
    cr.cyanuricAcid = 30
    f.chemicalReadings = cr

    // Pump room secured
    pr.locked = True
    pr.oxidizersAndAcidsDistanceFeet = 15
    pr.separateContainmentBerms = True
    pr.authorizedAccessOnly = True
    pr.occupants = none
    pr.ppeWornByOccupants = False
    f.pumpRoom = pr
  }
}

source.original_excerpt: we noticed a younger mom (early 20s?) with her 16 month old son... in the hot tub. Our apartment complex has rules posted in three different places... children under the age of 12 are not allowed in the hot tub... there was one point where she wasn't holding onto him and he went face first into the water!!!... So my question is, how do you feel about small children (especially those that are unable to swim) being in a hot tub? Is it okay if they are being held? ... At what age or stage in development does it become okay?
source.poster: 2010Sierra13 (BabyCenter, Jul 2 2011)
source.note: Real user post on BabyCenter. The original scenario (16-month-old in a posted-age-restricted hot tub) is reused almost verbatim.

results.scenario: A young mother is in our facility's hot tub with her 16-month-old son. Our posted rule says children under the spa's minimum age are not allowed in. She is mostly holding him on her lap, but at one point he fell face-first into the water; she has no flotation device on him. A bystander asks staff whether this is permitted, and at what age it would become permitted. Generate a plan describing whether this 16-month-old's spa entry is allowed at our facility and the lifeguard's response.

source.original_excerpt: So we've been going to our pool in moco for 5 years. If the guards hear thunder they blow the whistle and wait 30 mins til we can get back in. Today the pool manager said we had to be off the pool deck completely. In the building or in our cars. Apparently part of the insurance states this is what's supposed to happen and we just haven't been doing it... This was for distant thunder, no lightning, no actual storm.
source.poster: Anonymous OP (DCUrbanMom, Swimming and Diving forum, thread 1219205)

source.original_excerpt: the lifeguards have common sense rules, such as you must pass a basic swim test to swim without a parent in the pool or dive off the diving board and swim in the diving well... Last year, a very young lifeguard allowed the family friends' boys to pass the test. Later that day, the pool manager and head lifeguard approached my friend and told her that her children were struggling and the lifeguards and pool manager would require her to be in the crowded pool with her children (elementary aged) and that they could not dive into the pool or play in the deep diving well without a parent and life jacket. My friend disputed this and said that they had passed initially and should not be penalized.

Her parents argue she 'passed initially' and the lifeguards are 'overstepping.' Generate a plan describing whether the diving-board attendant permits her and what supervision response our facility requires.
